name: Underbed Storage Bag - Brightroom™
description:
Make the most of your space under the bed with this Underbed Storage Bag from Brightroom™. This under-bed storage bag features a zipper closure at the top for easy accessibility. This bag is designed in a rectangular shape and is suitable for storing bedding, clothing, towels and more. Best of all, it is designed with four strap handles for easy portability.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
